ddls:
CREATE TABLE "communes" (
  "ins" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commune */,
  "commune_name" TEXT /* Name of the commune */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the commune */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the commune */,
  "codposs" INTEGER /* Potential zoning code associated with the commune */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the commune in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the commune */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the commune */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the commune data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ins")
)

CREATE TABLE "infrastructure" (
  "infra_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infrastructure entry */,
  "commune_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commune where the infrastructure is located */,
  "infra_type" TEXT /* Type of infrastructure (e.g., road, school) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the infrastructure */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the infrastructure was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the infrastructure */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for maintenance activities */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the infrastructure */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the infrastructure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("infra_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infrastructure_commune_id FOREIGN KEY ("commune_id") REFERENCES communes ("ins")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "commune_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commune associated with the demographic data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count in the commune */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of residents */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ages (e.g., '0-14: 20%, 15-64: 65%, 65+: 15%') */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of genders (e.g., 'Male: 48%, Female: 52%') */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ethnicities (e.g., 'Caucasian: 60%, Asian: 20%, African: 10%, Other: 10%') */,
  "housing_type_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of housing types (e.g., 'Single-family homes: 60%, Apartments: 40%') */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the commune */,
  "education_level_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of education levels (e.g., 'High School: 40%, College: 50%, Graduate: 10%') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_commune_id FOREIGN KEY ("commune_id") REFERENCES communes ("ins")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public service entry */,
  "commune_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commune offering the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., healthcare, emergency) */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the service (e.g., 24/7, weekdays only) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the service provider */,
  "service_area" TEXT /* Area where the service is available */,
  "service_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the service */,
  "service_hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the service */,
  "service_staff" INTEGER /* Number of staff providing the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_commune_id FOREIGN KEY ("commune_id") REFERENCES communes ("ins")
)

CREATE TABLE "zoning_codes" (
  "zoning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zoning entry */,
  "commune_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commune associated with the zoning code */,
  "zoning_code" TEXT /* The zoning code for the commune */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the zoning category */,
  "zoning_area" TEXT /* Area covered by the zoning code */,
  "zoning_regulations" TEXT /* Specific regulations associated with the zoning code */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the zoning code became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the zoning code will expire (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zoning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zoning_codes_commune_id FOREIGN KEY ("commune_id") REFERENCES communes ("ins")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., planner, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the role */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the role */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_logs" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the session was initiated */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to initiate the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commune_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file entry */,
  "commune_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commune associated with the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* User who uploaded the file */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commune_files_commune_id FOREIGN KEY ("commune_id") REFERENCES communes ("ins")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "commune_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commune the feedback is related to */,
  "comment" TEXT /* User's comment or feedback */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., suggestion, complaint) */,
  "feedback_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., new, in review, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the feedback */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_commune_id FOREIGN KEY ("commune_id") REFERENCES communes ("ins")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "commune_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commune where the event takes place */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., meeting, workshop) */,
  "event_venue" TEXT /* Venue where the event takes place */,
  "event_organizer" TEXT /* User or department organizing the event */,
  "attendees" INTEGER /* Number of expected attendees */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_commune_id FOREIGN KEY ("commune_id") REFERENCES communes ("ins")
)
